content.speakerText: We’ve covered everything—how would you like to wrap this up?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已经讲完了所有内容——你希望怎么结束这次沟通？
expectedAnswers: Everything looks on track. Let’s connect next week if needed.
Appreciate your effort. I’ll review the documents and get back if I have questions.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否主动结束对话，未拖延或转移话题
语言准确性：使用了恰当的结束语结构，如 'Thanks for...', 'Let’s connect...', 'I'll get back...'
表达自然度：语气自然，符合职场对话节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了至少两个场景关键词如 'appreciate', 'thanks', 'keep me posted', 'connect'

content.speakerText: That concludes our meeting. Any closing remarks?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们的会议到此结束，有什么总结性意见吗？
expectedAnswers: Thanks for leading this—clear and well-organized!
All set. Looking forward to the next update.
Great summary. I’m confident we’re on the right path.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否以积极、简洁的方式结束会议，未提出新问题
语言准确性：语法和用词恰当，无中式英语表达
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在职场收尾时的语调与节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了至少一个正面评价词（great, clear, confident）和感谢表达

content.scenarioHint: 你在工作汇报结束前，想礼貌地征求对方的最终意见或反馈，以体现专业和尊重。
content.speakerText: Just to confirm, does everything look good on your end before we close this out?
content.speakerTextCn: 在我们结束之前，确认一下，您这边是否一切都满意？
expectedAnswers: Everything looks great—thanks for your time!
All set from my side. Great summary!
No further changes needed. Well done!
Appreciate the update. Keep me posted on next steps.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了征求最终反馈的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合职场英语口语习惯，语气得体
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'close out', 'everything looks good', 'appreciate' 等场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你刚完成一个项目简报，准备结束会议，想用简洁的方式邀请对方提出最后的意见或感谢对方的参与。
content.speakerText: Before we wrap up, is there anything you’d like to add or any next steps I should follow up on?
content.speakerTextCn: 在我们结束前，您有什么要补充的吗？或者我需要跟进哪些下一步行动？
expectedAnswers: Thanks for your input—happy to follow up on anything needed.
All clear here. Thanks for the collaboration!
No additions from my side. Great meeting!
Appreciate your time. I’ll send the summary by EOD.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰邀请对方补充意见或确认后续行动
语言准确性：语法和用词是否自然准确
表达自然度：是否符合职场结束语的简洁礼貌风格
关键词覆盖：是否使用了如 'wrap up', 'follow up', 'appreciate', 'next steps' 等关键词
